queries.question: what year and month is population density estimated to reach 340?
queries.sql:
SELECT Year, Month
From Annual_Demographics 
WHERE 
Density >=340 
ORDER BY Year, Month
LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?year ?month WHERE {
  ?annual_demographics a :Annual_Demographics .
  ?annual_demographics p:Year ?year .
  ?annual_demographics p:Month ?month .
  ?annual_demographics p:Density ?density_f .
  ?annual_demographics p:Year ?year_o .
  ?annual_demographics p:Month ?month_o .
  FILTER(?density_f >= 340)
}
ORDER BY ASC(?year_o) ASC(?month_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Which month was the census conducted?
queries.sql:
SELECT Month
From Annual_Demographics 
WHERE 
Census="US Census"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?month WHERE {
  ?annual_demographics a :Annual_Demographics .
  ?annual_demographics p:Month ?month .
  ?annual_demographics p:Census ?census_f .
  FILTER(?census_f = "US Census")
}
